summary: Phase 7 follow-up: Clear Safe State endpoint + HUD UI fully verified. 10 pytest passed (7 original spec tests + 3 new extras: membank tagging, pipeline-log step ordering, e-stop+actuate regression). Backend regression: 13/13 prior robot tests still pass. Frontend HUD: SYSTEMS tile → Robot Control panel renders clear-safe-state button only when selected device.status='safe_state'; click triggers window.confirm(); after accept, backend flips device to 'registered'. All 8 review_request bullets verified.

minor.issue: Endpoint mentioned in review_request does not exist (returns 405). Used /api/membank/list?category=council as fallback to verify the council/permanent entry tagged 'clear_safe_state' is written. If the spec really requires a public by-tag query, main agent should add a route; otherwise update the spec wording.

action_items: Optional: implement GET /api/membank/by-tag?tag=... (spec referenced it but route is missing). Current tag persistence verified via /list?category=council and tags[] inspection.
critical_code_review_comments: services/robot.py clear_safe_state() — safety contract correctly enforced (owner-only at route AND service level, exact-name confirm, must-already-be-in-safe_state guard, twin state.safe_state=false, safety_history cap=25, council/permanent memory entry).
Pipeline log step order verified: authorise → confirm → verify_safe_state → execute.
RobotPanel.js — button conditionally rendered only when selected.status === 'safe_state', uses window.confirm() with device name surfaced in the prompt; backend double-gates via body.confirm.
Regression intact: emergency_stop on healthy device flips to safe_state, subsequent owner ACTUATE rejected with 'device is in SAFE_STATE' reason.
test_credentials: X-Atlas-Role header — 'owner' for writes, 'guest' for rejection paths. No login required.
seed_data_creation: Created device HUD-CLEAR-TEST (id=3ab995a6094e4b829b6ac6206dd2f9e1) for UI test; ended in 'registered' state after successful clear. Extras test creates ephemeral CLEAR-X-*, HEALTHY-*, REG-* devices per test (no cleanup — collection grows; consider TTL or test-prefix sweep in future).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Robot collection accumulates test devices each iteration (40+ devices visible in HUD). Not a bug but worth a periodic cleanup script. /api/membank/by-tag route is missing — fallback path documented in test_robot_clear_safe_state_extras.py. POSEIDON-BUOY is currently 'registered' (not safe_state); AETHER-STATION and SOIL-WATCH are 'online' (good healthy references).
